news.title: World Cup predictions, final and 3/4 play off: Spain vs Argentina and France vs England
news.lede: Who knows more about soccer? Us ‘experts’, you the subscribers, a child, a dog or an algorithm? Come join us to predict each World Cup game.

news.title: ‘Hard to choose’ – Deco gives his verdict on the World Cup final between Spain and Argentina
news.lede: Barcelona sporting director Deco has admitted it’s hard to choose who will win the World Cup final as Spain prepare to take on Argentina in New York. Deco is in the city to watch the game on Sunday and will see many of his players feature in the showpiece event. Asked which team will be crowned world champions, Deco admitted he was struggling to pick a favorite. “I always go with my own people, but my people are everywhere.

news.title: Spain World Cup winner asks Trump for help after being denied entry to USA
news.lede: Former Spain defender Joan Capdevila has asked President Donald Trump for help after his visa to enter the U.S. for the World Cup final was denied. Spain will face Argentina on Sunday, July 19 at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey. Capdevila played the full match for Spain in its only other appearance in a World Cup final, the 2010 edition when La Roja won the title with a 1-0 win over the Netherlands after extra time. The 48-year-old is hoping to see Spain in action as it looks to win its second World Cup title but in a post on X, he said that his visa to enter the U.S. had been denied.

news.title: World Cup 2026: President Donald Trump questions Harry Kane's defensive role for England
news.lede: Harry Kane has scored six goals in the 2026 World Cup. United States President Donald Trump has joined criticism of England's tactics in their World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina, by questioning Harry Kane's second-half "defensive" role. Manager Thomas Tuchel's second-half substitutions have been criticised by pundits and supporters following the 2-1 defeat, as Argentina scored two late goals to set up Sunday's final against Spain (20:00 BST). BBC Sport reported on Thursday how a number of key players had been left disappointed at how England were instructed to finish the game having taken the lead through Anthony Gordon.

news.title: What Lionel Messi and Argentina can learn from Scotland, the last team to beat Spain
news.lede: Scotland's shock victory in 2023 offered an unlikely blueprint for the reigning European champions.

news.title: Why does American coverage of the World Cup not sound very American?
news.lede: The World Cup has dominated American TV coverage but it has been delivered with European accents.

news.title: The World Cup’s Golden Boot race: Mbappe and Messi lead but will Kane or Bellingham overtake them?
news.lede: With just two games remaining at the 2026 World Cup, the battle to finish as its top goalscorer is still too close to call.

news.title: Pedro Porro has showcased his qualities with Spain at the World Cup – and Tottenham can benefit
news.lede: The right-back was not in Spain's Euro 2024-winning squad and has endured years of turmoil at club level, but has excelled at the World Cup.
